testcase.name: Full Purchase Flow › Should complete the full purchase process
Verify successful login with valid credentials
Verify successful logout redirects to login screen
Verify locked out user receives appropriate error message
Sorting functionality › Should display exactly 6 products on the page
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by az
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by za
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by lohi
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by hilo

Sorting functionality › Should display exactly 6 products on the page
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by az
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by za
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by lohi
Sorting functionality › Verify that products are sorted correctly by hilo
